summary: Frontend-only testing of /local-appliance-repair page with Precision Craft design system. All 15 sections verified across desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Page loads correctly with all content, interactions, and SEO schemas.
context_for_next_testing_agent: LocalApplianceRepairPage fully tested with Precision Craft design system. All 15 sections verified: 1) Hero (background image, breadcrumb Home→Services→Appliance Repair, eyebrow 'SAN FRANCISCO & BAY AREA', H1, subtitle, 2 CTAs Book Online Now + phone, 4 trust badges), 2) Stats Bar (orange #FF5722 background, 4 stats: 10+/500+/$60/180 with dividers hidden on mobile), 3) Why Choose Local (5 problem cards with icons, last card full width, 'FixitBay solves all of these' text), 4) FixitBay Difference (2-column layout with text + 4 trust cards 01-04), 5) How It Works (4 step cards + detailed dark box with 4 numbered items), 6) Appliances We Repair (12 cards with icons/issues), 7) Mid CTA Strip (orange with Call/Book buttons), 8) FAQ (5 accordion items, click opens/closes with chevron), 9) Brands (18 logos in grid, all loaded correctly), 10) Service Areas (12 city pills linking to /{city-slug}-appliance-repair, 'View all 22 service cities' link), 11) Related Services (9 cards on navy background), 12) Final CTA (Call/Book buttons), 13) Footer (logo, phone, © 2026), 14) Floating BOOK REPAIR button (desktop after 300px scroll), 15) Mobile sticky bar (CALL/BOOK ONLINE/TEXT US). All phone links use tel:7605435733, all book links use /book?go=1. SEO verified: LocalBusiness, FAQPage (3 questions), BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schemas. Meta title, description, canonical, robots, OG tags, Twitter cards all present.
